charter.preamble: The Board of Governors is the standing deliberative organ of the Banco·Bral. It is convened quarterly at the Loshult mint-house, and on such extraordinary occasions as the Chair, in writing, deems necessary. Its proceedings are minuted in ink, countersigned in aluminum, and deposited in the vault of record.
charter.mandate: The Board is charged with safeguarding the convertibility of the Bral, approving the Mint Schedule, ratifying commemorative strikes, and exercising oversight of the Six. It does not transact; it does not trade; it does not speak to the press.

clauses.text: The Board shall comprise no fewer than five and no more than seven Governors, of whom three shall hold seats ex officio from the Mint Roster.
A quorum shall consist of four Governors present in person at Loshult, or three present and one by certified wire.
All motions pass by simple majority, save those concerning convertibility, which require unanimity of seated Governors.
The Chair shall preside, break ties, and affix the seal. No Governor save the Chair may address the Board without recognition.
Minutes shall be posted within fourteen days. Dissents shall be recorded by name, in full, without abbreviation.

charter.cadence: Convenes quarterly · Spring · Summer · Harvest · Mid-Winter

roster.name: Mikkel Linnet
roster.title: Chair of the Board of Governors
roster.function: Presides; affixes the seal; breaks ties; speaks for the Board.

roster.name: Simon Kjær Poulsen
roster.title: Governor for the Reserves
roster.function: Vouches for the ton; answers for the vault.

roster.name: Uffe Schjødt
roster.title: Governor for Audit
roster.function: Reconciles the ledger against the cans.

roster.name: Klaus Riskjær
roster.title: Governor for Foundry Relations
roster.function: Liaises with smelters; certifies alloy provenance.

roster.name: H. P. Wernersson
roster.title: External Observer
roster.function: Attends without vote; files the annual Remark.
